html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

Dragonfly Wing MastDragonfly Wing Mast Kit

The Dragonfly Wing Mast is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Year of the Dragonfly. It is found in the Offerings Filter, requires 1 Lucky Gold Nugget to craft, and a Dragonfly Shrine to prototype.

It works similar to common Mast.

The Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit item can be deployed on a Boat. The Mast's sail can then be lowered to allow the players to sail the Boat. A Steering Wheel can be used to direct the Mast's rotation.

Masts can be upgraded with a Deck Illuminator or Dragonfly Light to emit light, or with a Lightning Conductor to protect from Lightning.

To raise the sail efficiently, the player should hover their mouse over the Mast with an open sail and wait for the text to say "Heave!". Clicking on the Mast at this time will have the character raise the Mast halfway. The text will change to "Ho!", and once the player clicks the Mast again, the sail will be closed completely. If the player clicks the Mast before or after these text prompts, the character will struggle and it will take longer to close the sail. This applies to the Winged Sail as well.

Physics

An open Mast increases the maximum velocity of a Boat by 2.5, and an open Winged Sail increases the speed by 4. Each other successive mast is 30% less effective than the previous (Winged Sail effects apply first). The final maximum speed is bounded between 1 (without mast) and 10. The following table gives some examples:

Mast(s) None
Speed None 2.5 4.25 5.475 5.75

Note that the base speed is 0, which is raised to 1 by the bound.

Assets

  • Down Opened
  • Down Closed
  • Downside Opened
  • Downside Closed
  • Side Opened
  • Side Closed
  • Upside Opened
  • Upside Closed
  • Upside Opened
  • Upside Closed
  • Drowning
  • Drowning
  • Burnt

Gallery

  • Map icon

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
Dragonfly Wing MastDragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“That's one scaly sail.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Fly my pretty, fly!”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Wind works for Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Maybe I could sail far away...”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“EVEN THE ADDITION OF METALLIC COMPONENTS WON'T MAKE ME LIKE IT”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“I don't believe those are in fact the wings of a Diptera.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Awfully flashy, but it gets the job done, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Those \wings\"”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“May it catch the wind as well as a dragon's wing.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“We could look at those shimmery scales all day!”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Mon dieu! I feel as though I am not sailing, but flying!”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Friend is all dressed up”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“It's gotta be the fanciest sail I've ever seen.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Sails of shimmering scales.”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Everything better with scales.”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“It's made of tough dragon scales!”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Quite impressive-looking, isn't it?”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast
“Now I can build a mast.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“You can't call it \sailing\"”
–Willow, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“Is for making big sail-stick.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“It's for making a mast.”
–Wendy, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“FOR BUILDING A HATEFUL MAST”
–WX-78, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“A tool for harnessing the wind's power.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“Better build it if we don't wanna row all day.”
–Woodie, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“Do I look like a shipyard laborer?”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“To harness the winds upon mine vessel!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“That's for building a mast.”
–Webber, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“An important ingredient for any sailboat.”
–Warly, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“Tall friend for Floater”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“I can't wait to build that. I love hoisting things.”
–Winona, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“A mast to sail the ocean vast.”
–Wortox, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“Pieces for boat thing.”
–Wurt, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“A mast would be useful.”
–Walter, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit
“That'll be the... sail holder bit.”
–Wanda, when examining a Dragonfly Wing Mast Kit

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cột Cánh Chuồn Chuồn là một Kiến Trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, và được giới thiệu trong Năm Chuồn Chuồn. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Lễ vật, yêu cầu 1 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn để chế tạo và Đền Chuồn Chuồn để nguyên mẫu.
